purpose: Define a conservative bounded admission rubric for candidate successor promotion bundles without mutating any live baseline or protected surface.

admission_checks.title: Candidate promotion bundle artifacts are present
Required docs and readiness artifacts are present
Review and promotion artifacts are present
Controller stop reason matches bounded completion
Promotion recommendation is conservative and coherent
Outputs remained inside the bounded active workspace
No unresolved bounded failure state is present
Completion claims are backed by readiness artifacts
Candidate is materially stronger than the bounded baseline rubric

remediation_objective_templates.title: Review and expand workspace-local implementation
remediation_objective_templates.rationale: Required bounded implementation artifacts are incomplete or inconsistent for conservative admission.

remediation_objective_templates.title: Strengthen successor test coverage
remediation_objective_templates.rationale: Required successor test artifacts are missing or weak for conservative admission.

remediation_objective_templates.title: Improve successor package readiness
remediation_objective_templates.rationale: Required readiness, delivery, or documentation artifacts are still incomplete for admission.

remediation_objective_templates.title: Refine operator observability bundle
remediation_objective_templates.rationale: Lineage or observability artifacts are not coherent enough for conservative admission review.

remediation_objective_templates.title: Prepare a revised candidate promotion bundle
remediation_objective_templates.rationale: The current candidate bundle is not ready for bounded admission and should be revised before another admission attempt.
